# GradeMax
> Free Edexcel IGCSE and A Level past papers, topic-wise questions, custom worksheets, and test builder for students worldwide. All papers include official mark schemes. Free, no sign-up required.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://grademax.me/): Free Edexcel past papers and study tools for IGCSE and A Level
- [Past Papers](https://grademax.me/past-papers): All Edexcel IGCSE and A Level past papers organised by subject, year, and session
- [Worksheet Generator](https://grademax.me/generate): Generate custom PDF worksheets from real Edexcel past paper questions by topic
- [Test Builder](https://grademax.me/test-builder): Build timed practice tests from Edexcel past paper questions
- [Subjects](https://grademax.me/subjects): Browse all IGCSE and A Level subjects with topic-wise questions

## IGCSE Past Papers (Pearson Edexcel)

- [Physics (4PH1)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/physics): Forces, Electricity, Waves, Energy, Radioactivity, Astrophysics — 2011–2025
- [Mathematics A (4MA1)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/maths-a): Number, Algebra, Geometry, Statistics — 2011–2025
- [Mathematics B (4MB1)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/maths-b): Number, Algebra, Functions, Geometry, Trigonometry, Vectors, Statistics — 2011–2025
- [Chemistry (4CH1)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/chemistry): Atomic Structure, Bonding, Organic Chemistry, Rates, Equilibria — 2011–2025
- [Biology (4BI1)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/biology): Cell Biology, Genetics, Ecology, Human Biology — 2011–2025
- [ICT (4IT1)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/ict): Digital Devices, Connectivity, Multimedia, Databases, Spreadsheets — 2011–2025

## A Level (IAL) Past Papers (Pearson Edexcel)

- [Pure Mathematics 1 (WMA11)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/pure-mathematics-1): Algebra, Differentiation, Integration, Coordinate Geometry
- [Mechanics 1 (WME01)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/mechanics-1): Kinematics, Dynamics, Statics, Moments
- [Statistics 1 (WST01)](https://grademax.me/past-papers/statistics-1): Probability, Statistical Distributions, Representation of Data

## Key Facts

- All papers are completely free — no sign-up or payment required
- Papers include question papers (QP) and mark schemes (MS) as PDF
- Available sessions: January, May/June, October/November
- Years available: 2011 to 2025
- Exam board: Pearson Edexcel
- Qualifications: IGCSE (International GCSE) and International A Level (IAL)
- Custom worksheets generated by topic, difficulty, and year range in seconds
- Serving students globally preparing for Edexcel examinations

## Contact

- Website: https://grademax.me
- Contact: https://grademax.me/contact
